# Q6 windowcomp lag previous  time per pair (network beaconing)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

C2 beaconing detection — find steady-cadence connections to a single destination. Q6 windowcomp lag previous  time per pair. `windowcomp lag()` yields the prior row's value within a partition (alias is the LAST clause).

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_local_ip != null and action_remote_ip != null | fields action_local_ip, action_remote_ip, _time | windowcomp lag(_time) by action_local_ip, action_remote_ip sort asc _time as prev_time | filter prev_time != null | sort asc action_local_ip, action_remote_ip, _time | limit 30
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 30). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
